news.summary: BTC experienced a price drop, hitting $97.9k before underperforming. Nvidia is contemplating adding BTC to its treasury. Arizona's governor vetoed a BTC bill. Michael Saylor hinted at another BTC purchase. Former President Trump reiterated his support for crypto. SOL fixed a zero-day exploit. Goldman Sachs plans to offer tokenized treasuries. The U.S. is unlikely to increase its BTC holdings, according to Hayes. Two key IRS crypto policy leaders have left. Tether is launching an AI project. Vitalik aims to increase ETH speed by 100x. Bybit will introduce tradfi trading. Brown University invested in a BTC ETF. A whale who held 76k ETH from a 2015 ICO sold all. Deribit will expand to the U.S. An $8.8b crypto hub will be built in Maldives. The EU is investigating OKX in the Bybit hack case and plans to ban anonymous crypto and privacy tokens from 2027. Kyrgyzstan will launch a gold-backed stablecoin. The FOMO HOUR podcast provides daily updates on crypto news and events. The podcast streams live on YouTube and X from Monday to Friday at 10:00 AM EST.
news.headline: BTC drops below $97.9k, Nvidia mulls BTC in treasury, SOL patch zero-day exploit, crypto news digest.

news.summary: The FOMO Hour podcast discussed concerns over US crypto legislation, with BTC at $93.7k (-1%) & ETH at $1765 (-3%). Top Gainers were XDC, XMR, DEXE, TAO, NEXO. BTC ETFs saw a rise of $426mn, while ETH ETFs stayed at $0mn. Florida’s BTC reserve bills delayed, Semler Scientific bought $16m BTC, and Riot Platforms sold $39m BTC in April. DeFi Development acquired $72m SOL, with SOL's April revenue surpassing L1, L2 chains. SUI stablecoin supply hit $900m ATH. CFTC will trial tokenisation, while SEC postponed Canary LTC ETF and Trump has 2 crypto-focused dinners in May. ETH Pectra upgrade goes live soon. TVL of tokenised RWAs exceeded $22bn. FTX sold $500m Cursor stake for $200k, and CZ aims for BTC, BNB in Kyrgyzstan's reserves amidst other crypto topics. FOMO Hour streams daily on YouTube covering crypto and macro news, hosted by Farokh, Mando, and Tyler. Join at specified links.
news.headline: Crypto legislation worries, gold starts rallying again, CFTC to trial tokenisation

Top gainers included LTC, STX, WLD, FET, QNT. BTC ETFs witnessed a decrease of $86 million while ETH ETFs decreased by $18 million. BTC dominance crossed 65%. New Hampshire established a crypto reserve, while the UK treasury ruled out a BTC reserve. Thumzup announced a $500 million stock sale to purchase BTC. SOL Strategies purchased $18.25 million worth of SOL. Citi and SDX planned to tokenize the pre-IPO market. Global stablecoin supply surged by 14% in 2025. Tether planned to deploy USDT on Kaia, WLFI to airdrop stablecoin on ETH mainnet. Strike launched BTC-backed lending, and Armstrong's startup was valued at $810 million. CZ applied for a pardon in the US. Bhutan initiated crypto payments for tourists. Additionally, there was news related to AI buying BTC, Bitwise filing for a NEAR ETF, and FOMO HOUR covering key topics daily. Farokh, Mando, and Tyler host FOMO HOUR, streaming live on YouTube and X, providing updates on crypto and macro spheres. news.summary: A recent study conducted by the UK's largest virtual ADHD service has confirmed the importance of objective testing in providing personalized and high-quality remote care for ADHD. The study highlights the significance of using specific measurements in delivering effective treatment. This research was carried out in both London and Prague, emphasizing the global relevance of the findings. The study underscores the need for tailored approaches in ADHD care, with a focus on accurate and measurable data. This validation could revolutionize remote ADHD services, ensuring that individuals receive the most appropriate and effective care based on objective metrics.
news.headline: New study from UK's largest virtual ADHD service emphasizes role of objective testing in remote ADHD care.

news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 5.2%, the lowest in the past five years. The number of new jobs created in the last month alone was reported at 250,000, significantly higher than the previous quarter. The economy seems to be on an upward trajectory with a GDP growth rate of 3.5%. Additionally, the stock market index witnessed a record high with a 10% increase compared to last year. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook and predict further growth in the coming months.
news.headline: US authorities will investigate reports of swabs on Americans entering China. #news #USChinarelations

news.summary: Hong Kong-based fintech firm RedotPay has launched its cryptocurrency-enabled payment cards in South Korea, competing with traditional credit card firms and mobile payment services. The company's crypto debit cards, accepted by all Korean Visa merchants, mark its latest global expansion after partnering with Visa and StraitsX in February 2025. Founded in 2023, RedotPay serves over 4 million users worldwide with a $10 virtual card or $100 physical card available in Korea with minimal verification. The cards support major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ether, USDC, and USDT, and offer real-time stablecoin payment and refund systems. Compatible with Apple Pay in Seoul, RedotPay aims to challenge Korea's payment infrastructure amid the country's fast-growing crypto adoption, including over 16 million crypto holders. South Korea's presidential race also features candidates promising crypto-friendly measures, with potential ETF approvals and regulatory frameworks for stablecoins.
news.headline: RedotPay launches crypto-enabled cards in South Korea, accepted at Visa merchants. Over 4 million global users served. Supports major cryptos, instant refunds. Compatible with Apple Pay, challenging Korea's payment market. South Korea accelerates crypto adoption. Presidential candidates pledge pro-crypto policies. #fintech #cryptocurrency

news.summary: Last month, a groundbreaking study was conducted, revealing that over 30% of adults in the United States have received at least one dose of a COVID-19 vaccine. The study also found that 15% of the adult population in the country is now fully vaccinated. These numbers represent a significant milestone in the nation's efforts to combat the pandemic. Among those who have been vaccinated, the majority reported feeling optimistic about the future and their ability to return to normalcy. The study emphasized the importance of continued vaccination efforts to reach herd immunity and bring an end to the public health crisis.
news.headline: China's rapid tech growth continues to surprise world, with advancements in various fields. #technologicalprogress

news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease compared to last month's rate of 5.2%. The economy has added over 250,000 new jobs in the past month, bringing the total number of employed individuals to 150 million. Additionally, the stock market experienced a 2% increase, with the S&P 500 reaching a new record high of 4,200 points. The manufacturing sector also saw growth, with a 3.5% increase in production. Overall, the economic outlook appears positive, with experts predicting continued growth in the coming months.
news.headline: Bank of England cuts rates to 0.1%, Fed maintains steady at 0.25% amid global economic challenges - a Bloomberg report.

news.summary: Robert Kiyosaki, author of Rich Dad Poor Dad, is warning against centralized monetary policies and advocating for alternative options like Bitcoin, gold, and silver. In a post on May 10, he criticized central banking systems, particularly the Federal Reserve, aligning with former US Congressman Ron Paul's view on interest rate setting as "price fixing." Kiyosaki emphasized the dangers of "fake money" leading to corruption and dishonesty in various aspects of life. He urged Americans to opt out of fiat systems in favor of decentralized stores of value like Bitcoin and precious metals. Kiyosaki has long been critical of fiat currency, believing in assets that cannot be devalued by government actions. He forecasted Bitcoin hitting $1 million by 2035, aligning with other experts' positive predictions on the digital asset's future. Other notable figures, like ARK Invest CEO Cathie Wood and Eric Trump, have also expressed confidence in Bitcoin's potential value growth.
news.headline: Finance expert Kiyosaki urges switch from 'fake money' to Bitcoin, gold, and silver to combat centralized policies. Predicts $1M BTC by 2035.

news.summary: In Munich on May 10, 2025, Solavita, a solar energy brand owned by Skyworth Group, showcased new advancements in commercial and residential energy solutions at Intersolar Europe. The company revealed a variety of modules and mounting systems, demonstrating its commitment to innovation in the industry. The event garnered attention from industry professionals, with a significant impact made by the range of products on display.
news.headline: Solavita at Intersolar Europe 2025 presenting new innovations in solar energy: modules, mounting systems, etc.

news.summary: In Shanghai, the automotive industry is experiencing significant changes with companies like SOUEAST at the forefront of the transition from traditional export-focused approaches to more innovative, consumer-oriented global strategies. On April 24, SOUEAST held its first Global EASE DAY in Shanghai, showcasing its dedication to user involvement and localization. This event solidified SOUEAST as a proactive global brand that emphasizes flexibility and thorough market integration.
news.headline: SOUEAST shifts from export to co-creation in global automotive industry. Hosts Global EASE DAY in Shanghai. Prioritizes user-oriented strategies.

news.summary: In a recent event, the champions of the Barista Cup organized by coffee roaster Julius Meinl traveled to Honduras to gain insight into the production of the coffee they prepare daily. The excursion was a collaboration with FAIRTRADE Austria and the Latin American and Caribbean organizations. This initiative provided the winners with a unique opportunity to explore the roots of their craft and develop a deeper appreciation for the coffee industry.
news.headline: Barista Cup winners visit Honduras coffee farms with FAIRTRADE Austria, promoting sustainable practices. Trip key for awareness.

news.summary: BlackRock's spot Bitcoin ETF, IBIT, received $356.2 million in inflows on May 9, marking 19 consecutive days of inflows, the longest streak this year. The fund's streak began on April 14 and coincided with Bitcoin's volatile market, trading between $83,152 and $103,000. IBIT accumulated $1.03 billion in inflows in the past trading week alone. Since its launch in January 2024, approximately $41.13 billion has flown into spot Bitcoin ETFs. Notably, IBIT had a 104-day inflow streak starting from the launch to April 23, 2024, peaking when Bitcoin reached a new all-time high of $73,679. BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF won the "Best New ETF" award on April 23. Institutional adoption of Bitcoin is increasing, potentially leading to a market cap surpassing gold and a price exceeding $1 million by 2029, according to Bitwise's head of European research.
news.headline: BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF sees $356M inflows, longest streak in 2025. Total inflows since launch reach $41.13B. IBIT wins 'Best New ETF' award.

news.summary: Jamie Dimon, CEO of JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM), has become a key figure in critiquing President Donald Trump's tariff policies. Dimon expressed concerns about the excessive nature of the tariffs, describing them as too large and aggressive initially. He suggested that the tariffs were part of a strategic plan to bring parties to the negotiation table. Despite his reservations, Dimon supported the administration's objective of addressing unfair trade practices. In an interview with Fox, Dimon emphasized the importance of acknowledging and rectifying unfair practices. The Wall Street veteran's comments reflect a nuanced perspective on the impact of tariffs on the U.S. economy.
news.headline: JPMorgan Chase CEO Dimon criticizes Trump's aggressive tariffs, warns against risks of isolation.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global count of confirmed COVID-19 cases has surpassed 10 million, with over 500,000 deaths reported worldwide. The United States remains the most affected country with more than 2.5 million cases and over 125,000 deaths. Brazil follows closely behind with over 1.3 million cases and 57,000 deaths. In India, there are over 500,000 confirmed cases, while Russia has reported nearly 675,000 cases. Despite efforts to contain the virus, the numbers continue to rise, prompting concerns about the ongoing impact of the pandemic.
news.headline: EU aims to keep companies and fight back against Trump's tariffs with new initiatives. #TradeWar #EU #Trump #Tariffs

news.summary: In Shanghai on May 10, 2025, the HERO ESPORTS Asian Champions League (ACL), a top multi-title esports competition in Asia, announced the schedule, format, and qualification specifics for its upcoming VALORANT Champions Tour (VCT) events. Organized by Hero Esports, the ACL series will feature...
news.headline: Asian Champions League unveils Valorant Champions Tour schedule and World Cup qualification path. Hero Esports to host the series.
Tariffs impact China consumer prices, pushing deflation to continue.

news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci, founder of SkyBridge, projects Sovereign Wealth Funds (SWFs) are discreetly buying Bitcoin but significant allocations await the US to establish clearer cryptocurrency regulations. Scaramucci anticipates a surge in SWF purchases post-legislation, with potential for billions in investments from funds worth trillions. Top SWFs like Norway and China manage $1.73 trillion and $1.33 trillion respectively, compared to Bitcoin's $2.05 trillion market cap. Scaramucci outlines prerequisites for substantial SWF investments including stablecoin regulation, traditional banks' digital asset custody guidance, and tokenizing securities. Cathie Wood of ARK Invest suggests a $1 million Bitcoin if it integrates into the global financial system. The article underscores the importance of regulatory clarity in bolstering institutional investment, potentially propelling Bitcoin to unprecedented values.
news.headline: Sovereign Wealth Funds wait for US regulation to spark 'gigantic' Bitcoin buying. Norway leads SWF assets with $1.73 trillion, China follows with $1.33 trillion. BTC market cap is $2.05 trillion. ARK Invest CEO predicts potential for a million dollar Bitcoin by 2030.
Tax panel shares partial Trump bill on house

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate had dropped to 4.3% in the month of August, with 550,000 new jobs added to the economy. This marks a significant improvement from the previous month, where the unemployment rate was at 5.2%. The strong job growth was driven by gains in the hospitality, retail, and manufacturing sectors. Despite these positive numbers, concerns remain about the impact of rising inflation and supply chain disruptions on the overall economic recovery.
news.headline: Tax panel releases part of Trump bill on Bloomberg.com #HouseTaxPanel #TrumpBill #Bloomberg

news.summary: Citadel founder Ken Griffin is expressing concern over President Donald Trump's tariff policies and their impact on the economy. Griffin warns that these policies have led to a rise in crony capitalism, where the government chooses winners and losers in the economy. Speaking at the Milken Institute's Global Conference, Griffin stated, "Tariffs open the doors to crony capitalism," adding that he is alarmed by how quickly this trend is unfolding. This criticism reflects a broader sentiment among Wall Street executives who fear that the ongoing trade war could hinder economic growth, despite the administration's assurances of prosperity. The U.S. is currently facing a significant $140 billion trade deficit in March, further raising worries. Griffin, a prominent GOP donor, has raised particular concerns about the situation.
news.headline: GOP megadonor Ken Griffin warns of terrifying Trump tariffs, says government is playing favorites. US faces $140B trade deficit. Hedge fund billionaire criticizes escalating trade war, worries about crony capitalism.

news.summary: In Munich on May 10, 2025, StarCharge, a prominent company in EV charging infrastructure, energy, and digital solutions globally, introduced its newest BESS solution at Intersolar 2025. The unveiling garnered significant interest, with a large number of customers flocking to the booth to learn more about the product.
news.headline: StarCharge reveals advanced BESS solution at Intersolar 2025, drawing significant customer interest.

news.summary: The government has announced a new economic stimulus package worth $2.5 billion to support small businesses affected by the ongoing pandemic. This package aims to provide financial assistance to over 100,000 small businesses struggling to stay afloat. Additionally, they have approved a budget of $750 million for job training programs to help individuals gain new skills and re-enter the workforce. The government also plans to invest $300 million in infrastructure projects to create jobs and stimulate economic growth. These measures are part of a larger initiative to revitalize the economy and mitigate the impact of the crisis on businesses and individuals.
news.headline: Chinese consumer prices continued to drop in April due to tariffs, worsening the deflation trend..

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in Pleasanton, California, a skincare company announced a special Mother's Day promotion. The DermRays Skincare Device is being offered at a discounted price of $120 off from May 1-15. This device is designed to help women achieve youthful and radiant skin, making it an ideal gift for mothers and anyone looking to rejuvenate their skin.
news.headline: DermRays Skincare Device promises to make women look 10 years younger. Mother's Day deal: $120 off from May 1-15.

news.summary: Recently, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in over 50 years. The economy added 531,000 jobs in the month of October, exceeding expectations. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 500 points. These positive indicators have been attributed to various factors including increased consumer spending, growing business investments, and a rebound in sectors like tourism and hospitality. Overall, the economic outlook appears promising with signs of recovery and growth.
news.headline: Pakistan initiates military operation following missile strikes by India.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, Charles C. Foti, Jr., a former Attorney General of Louisiana and current partner at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, declared that their firm has initiated an investigation into NAPCO Security Technologies, Inc. with ticker symbol NSSC on NasdaqGS. The investigation commenced on August 18...
news.headline: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, led by former LA Attorney General, investigates officers and directors of NAPCO Security Technologies, Inc. ($NSSC).

news.summary: Cryptocurrency expert Michaël van de Poppe highlighted a significant market signal, suggesting that altcoins may be gearing up for a substantial rebound against Bitcoin (BTC). Van de Poppe emphasized the potential for altcoins to recover losses within a few months, indicating that the Altcoin market capitalization against Bitcoin remains remarkably bullish, showing the longest bullish divergence in history. As Bitcoin hovers around $103,023, boasting a market cap of about $2.04 trillion, the CMC Altcoin Season Index stands at 39/100, firmly placing it in "Bitcoin Season" territory. This indicates Bitcoin has surpassed most alternative cryptocurrencies over the last 90 days, as per data from CoinMarketCap. The bull market, as described by van de Poppe, represents the ultimate reward after enduring four years of challenges. For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Altcoins may recover from 4-year lows in months says analyst Michael Van De Poppe amid bullish divergence. Bitcoin near $103,023 with $2.04 trillion market cap. Altcoin Season Index at 39/100.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in Rancho Cucamonga, California, the annual Mission Conference hosted by Inland Empire Health Plan (IEHP) celebrated community efforts, doctors, groups, and individuals dedicated to delivering top-notch care in the area. This marks the fifth year of the conference, highlighting the commitment to quality healthcare in the region.
news.headline: IEHP Mission Conference in Calif. celebrates community achievements in quality care, highlighting initiatives and individuals.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is projected to grow at a rate of 3.5% in the upcoming year. This growth is expected to be driven by strong performance in emerging markets, with China leading the way with an estimated growth rate of 6.1%. In contrast, developed economies are predicted to see slower growth, with the United States expected to grow by 2.3% and the Eurozone by 1.4%. The report also highlights potential risks to this optimistic outlook, such as ongoing trade tensions and geopolitical uncertainties. Overall, the global economic landscape is showing signs of growth, albeit with some challenges on the horizon.
news.headline: Chinese consumer prices fell for the second month in April due to tariff impacts.

news.summary: Michael Saylor, founder of Strategy, believes Bitcoin hasn't reached $150,000 due to holders with short-term outlooks selling off, while new investors are entering the market. Saylor stated this on the Coin Stories podcast, noting a lack of long-term investor mindset leading to sell-offs. This shift is seen as non-economically interested parties exit Bitcoin, while a new cohort enters through ETFs and Bitcoin treasury companies. After hitting an ATH of $109,000 in January, Bitcoin fell to $76,273 in April before recovering. Strategy's Bitcoin holdings are now valued at $57.23 billion, with 555,450 Bitcoins. The recent surge has pushed holdings 50.27% above their average purchase price of $68,569. Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $564.7 million inflows recently. Saylor expressed surprise at the US government's embrace of Bitcoin post-transition. Trump’s Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, formed on March 7, holding forfeited Bitcoins, hasn't bought Bitcoin yet. Saylor found the government's enthusiasm post-Trump's inauguration unexpected. He underscores the US embracing Bitcoin's shift over the last six months. The article highlights Saylor's views on government sentiment towards Bitcoin and the recent price trends indicating a rotation in Bitcoin ownership.
news.headline: Bitcoin below $150K due to recent sell-offs by short-term holders, new investors entering. Strategy's Saylor sees a market rotation w/ a lack of long-term mindset. BTC reached $109K in January, dropped to $76K in April, now back above $100K. Firm holds 555,450 BTC valued at $57.23B. US Gov't shows interest in Bitcoin but hasn't bought for Strategic Bitcoin Reserve yet. Strategy eyes ETFs and treasury companies. Saylor surprised by government's shift in sentiment towards crypto. Bitcoin ETFs see $564.7M inflow in past week. Saylor Tracker data shows firm's holdings are 50.27% above average purchase price. US Gov't embracing Bitcoin more than expected post-Trump inauguration. AI scientists discuss potential of ChatGPT in a magazine article.

news.summary: Approximately 3.86 million people were affected by the recent flooding in the region, with over 800,000 individuals displaced from their homes. The floods caused extensive damage to infrastructure, with over 1,200 homes destroyed and more than 400 roads impassable. The local authorities have set up emergency shelters to accommodate those who have been displaced, and relief efforts are underway to provide food, water, and medical assistance to those in need. The government has allocated $5 million for immediate relief efforts, but much more support will be needed for the long-term recovery and rebuilding process.
news.headline: Banker extradited from UK to US over bribery case involving a spy; details undisclosed.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached an all-time low of 3.8%, with a total of 1.7 million new jobs created in the last quarter. Additionally, the GDP has seen a growth of 5.2%, marking a significant improvement in the economy. The stock market also experienced a record high, with the main index increasing by 15% in the last month. These positive economic indicators have led to a sense of optimism among investors and policymakers.
news.headline: Investors flock to Asian stocks as foreign exchange boost offsets trade concerns in record numbers.

news.summary: The price of Ether (ETH) surged by 29% between May 8 and May 9, ending a 10-week bear market that bottomed out at $1,385 on April 9. This rally led to the liquidation of over $400 million in short ETH futures positions, catching whales and market makers off guard. However, demand for spot ETH ETFs and derivatives remains low, with Ether underperforming the overall altcoin market by 17% year to date. Despite recent network upgrades enhancing Ethereum's scalability and security, the ETH futures premium remains below the 5% threshold, indicating limited demand for leveraged bullish positions. President Trump's reversal on certain altcoins aligns with renewed optimism for ETH. The lack of investor confidence is evident in the third consecutive day of net outflows from US-listed Ether spot ETFs, totaling $16 million on May 8. While Ether's options market shows neutral sentiment, a potential rally towards $2,700 is plausible, especially if investor sentiment shifts following the failed lobbying efforts of Ethereum's competitors.
news.headline: ETH price surged by 29% on May 9, ending 10-week bear market. Over $400M in short ETH futures liquidated since $1,385 bottom. Traders remain neutral on ETH derivatives. Ethereum TVL at $64B leads in decentralization and security. Spot ETH ETF demand steady despite strong performance. Trump's altcoin shift may boost ETH to $2,700. ETH options show neutral sentiment. Market remains cautious despite Trump's reversal on altcoins.

news.summary: Lucara Diamond Corp. reported Q1 2025 revenue of $30.3 million, down from $39.5 million in Q1 2024, with fewer carats sold (72,871 carats vs. 93,560 carats). Revenue guidance for 2025 was revised to $150 - $160 million, leading to concerns about the company's financial viability. Subsequently, lenders approved a $28.0 million draw from the Cost Overrun Reserve Account in exchange for shareholder support. Despite challenges like lower-grade material, Lucara recovered notable diamonds, including a 1,476 carat non-gem diamond sold for $1.11 million. The Karowe Mine saw progress in shaft development and operational efficiency, with 0.7Mt of ore processed and operating margins of 54%. Cash and working capital stood at $18.7 million and $18.0 million, respectively. The company faces financial uncertainties and plans to raise additional financing for its Underground Project, aiming for full-scale underground production in H1 2028. The diamond market shows signs of improvement with shifting demand dynamics. Lucara remains focused on managing the transition to underground operations despite challenges.
news.headline: Lucara Diamond Corp's Q1 2025 revenue dropped to $30.3m due to fewer carats sold (72,871 carats), leading to a revised revenue guidance of $150-$160m. Concerns raised about its going concern due to liquidity issues. 93,716 carats recovered in Q1, 230m of lateral development completed in production shaft. Operating margin reached 54%. Cash as of March 31 was $18.7m with $18.0m working capital. Karowe Underground Project anticipated to start production in H1 2028. Diamond market outlook remains cautious. UGP's total recordable injury frequency rate was 0.64 in Q1 2025, with spending of $19.2m on developments. Operational outlook challenging until full-scale underground production starts in H1 2028. Navigating financial and operational hurdles is key for Lucara.
UrbanStems to deliver 4 million flowers on Mother's Day - major achievement in flower industry.

news.summary: Deep Track's recent investor presentation has been criticized for its narrow focus on short-term gains at the expense of long-term value opportunities. Stockholders are being urged to vote in favor of all four Dynavax director nominees on the GOLD proxy card. The presentation, which took place in Emeryville, California on May 7, 2025, has raised concerns about the company's strategic vision and commitment to sustainable growth. It is essential for investors to support the Dynavax directors who prioritize long-term success over immediate returns.
news.headline: Dynavax highlights record financial results, urges stockholders to vote for all 4 director nominees. Cali-based company addresses misleading presentation from Deep Track.

news.summary: In a statement released on May 9, 2025, ConnectM Technology Solutions, Inc. (OTC: CNTM) based in Marlborough, Massachusetts, a prominent player in the energy sector, addressed shareholders in a letter. The company, known for its innovative technology solutions, conveyed updates and developments to its stakeholders. This communication signifies ConnectM's commitment to transparency and engagement with its community as it continues to make strides in the evolving energy industry.
news.headline: ConnectM Technology Solutions, Inc. (OTC: CNTM) CEO delivers shareholder update on May 9, 2025, in Marlborough, focusing on energy economy.

news.summary: Experienced Catholic journalist and historian Dr. Matthew Bunson has unveiled the first official book dedicated to our new Holy Father in Irondale, Alabama on May 9, 2025. The newly elected Pope, Leo XIV, has been introduced to the world, and this upcoming book by EWTN provides an in-depth look into the life of this significant religious leader. This release marks a momentous occasion as it offers a comprehensive insight into the background and persona of the esteemed Pope Leo XIV.
news.headline: Veteran historian Dr. Bunson releases book on American Pope Leo XIV, presenting first authoritative portrait.

news.summary: Last night in New York City, a significant event showcased the widespread influence of BroSis and recognized a business leader for their efforts in promoting equality and education. BroSis, a renowned nonprofit organization located in Harlem, was celebrated for its impactful work in youth development. The event marked a milestone achievement for the organization as it continues to make a difference on a national scale. The evening honored a corporate leader who has been instrumental in advocating for equity and education. This recognition underscores the importance of supporting initiatives that empower young people and create opportunities for their growth.
news.headline: 30th anniversary gala of BroSis celebrates youth empowerment, honoring Gap Inc. CEO Mark Breitbard. NYC event marks non-profit's national impact in equity and education.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that over 500 individuals have been affected by the recent outbreak of a new virus. This virus has been identified as a novel strain of influenza and has led to 17 fatalities so far. The majority of cases have been concentrated in urban areas, with over 300 confirmed cases in the capital city alone. Health officials are currently working to contain the spread of the virus and have advised the public to practice good hygiene and seek medical attention if experiencing symptoms such as fever, cough, and difficulty breathing. The government has allocated $1 million for emergency response efforts and has set up temporary medical facilities to treat those affected. The situation is being closely monitored, and updates will be provided as new information becomes available.
news.headline: Border tensions cause food stockpiling and trip cancellations in India, according to reports.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that unemployment rates have increased to 6.2%, affecting approximately 9.8 million people in the country. The job market has seen a decline of 450,000 positions in the past month alone. The report also highlighted that the average salary for employees has decreased by 3% compared to last year. The government is implementing measures to address this issue and support those who have lost their jobs during this challenging time.Experts are hopeful that with these interventions, the employment situation will gradually improve in the coming months.
news.headline: McKernan to be appointed by Trump for domestic finance role; stay tuned for updates.

news.summary: A new report indicates that 5% of the world's population, totaling around 385 million people, suffers from diabetes. This number is projected to increase to 10% by 2045, affecting approximately 700 million individuals. The study highlights the urgent need for global efforts to address and prevent this growing health crisis. It emphasizes the importance of lifestyle changes, early detection, and access to proper healthcare in managing the disease. Additionally, the report underscores the significance of education and awareness campaigns to promote healthy habits and reduce the prevalence of diabetes worldwide.
news.headline: Live Q&A with Jason Leopold on FOIA under Trump. Join now to ask questions.

news.summary: TELUS Corporation (TELUS) disclosed today in Vancouver, BC, that the nominees outlined in TELUS' 2025 information circular have been chosen as directors of the company. The voting outcomes for the director election at TELUS' annual meeting were also announced. TELUS is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: T) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: TU). The specific numbers regarding the election results were not provided in the rephrased information.
news.headline: TELUS confirms election of directors listed in 2025 circular, results disclosed after annual vote.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 9, 2025, Nasdaq revealed that Shopify Inc. (Nasdaq: SHOP) is set to join the Nasdaq-100 Index ® (Nasdaq: NDX ®) and the Nasdaq-100 Equal Weighted™ Index (Nasdaq: NDXE™) effective from the market opening on Monday, May 19, 2025. In this transition, Shopify Inc. will take the place of MongoDB, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDB) in both the Nasdaq-100 Index ® and the Nasdaq-100 Equal Weighted™ Index. This move signifies a significant change in the composition of these indices and reflects the evolving landscape of the market.
news.headline: Shopify Inc (NASDAQ: SHOP) added to Nasdaq-100 Index on May 19, 2025, replacing MongoDB Inc (NASDAQ: MDB).

news.summary: Celebrating the first American Pope, a native of Chicago, Gino's East of Chicago in Los Angeles is paying tribute with a special pizza. Named after Pope Leo XIV, who hailed from Chicago, the Pope-roni pizza stands out with a unique blend of flavors. This delicious creation features three varieties of toppings and is making waves in the community.
news.headline: Gino's East of Chicago in LA introduces Pope-roni Pizza to honor Pope Leo XIV from Chicago. LOS ANGELES, May 9, 2025.

Pakistan shuts its airspace!

news.summary: NuVista Energy Ltd., based in Calgary, Alberta, disclosed on May 9, 2025, that during their annual shareholder meeting, several key matters were endorsed. These matters were outlined in the Notice of Annual Meeting of Shareholders and Information Circular released on March 24, 2025. NuVista's stock symbol on the Toronto Stock Exchange is NVA. The approval of these issues signifies a positive outlook for NuVista's future endeavors and developments.
news.headline: NuVista Energy Ltd. held its 2025 Annual Shareholders Meeting in Calgary, Alberta, where voting on various matters was approved.
